name: @radzor/feature-flag
description: Simple feature flag evaluation with per-user overrides, percentage rollouts, and environment-based defaults. No external service required — flags are defined in code or config files.

inputs.name: flags
inputs.description: Default flag values. boolean=on/off, number=percentage rollout (0-100), string=variant name.

inputs.name: overrideEnv
inputs.description: Allow environment variables to override flag values (e.g. FF_MY_FLAG=true).

inputs.name: overrideHeader
inputs.description: HTTP header name for per-request overrides (e.g. X-Feature-Flags). Useful in testing.

outputs.name: evaluation
outputs.type: { flag: string; value: boolean | string; reason: 'default' | 'env' | 'override' | 'rollout' }
outputs.description: Flag evaluation result with the resolved value and reason.

events.name: onFlagEnabled
events.description: Fired when a boolean flag evaluates to true.

events.name: onFlagDisabled
events.description: Fired when a boolean flag evaluates to false.

events.name: onOverride
events.description: Fired when an env or header override changes the evaluated value.

actions.name: isEnabled

params.name: userId
params.description: User ID for percentage rollout bucket assignment.

actions.description: Evaluate a boolean flag for a user. For percentage flags, deterministically bucketed by userId.

actions.name: getValue

params.name: defaultValue
params.description: Value returned if flag is not defined.

actions.description: Get the raw value of a flag.

actions.name: setOverride
actions.description: Set a runtime override for a flag (in-memory, not persisted).

actions.name: getAll
actions.description: Get all evaluated flag values for a given user context.

llm.constraints: Percentage rollout uses a deterministic hash of (flagName + userId) — same user always gets the same bucket. Overrides are in-memory and reset on restart. For persistent overrides and a UI, use a dedicated service like Unleash or LaunchDarkly.
